Functions for microsecond and millisecond delays using busy-waiting.

# Purpose
This header file provides function declarations for implementing precise time delays in C programs. It includes two functions: [`delay_us`](<#delay_us>) and [`delay_ms`](<#delay_ms>). The [`delay_us`](<#delay_us>) function allows for a delay at a microsecond granularity, while the [`delay_ms`](<#delay_ms>) function enables a delay at a millisecond granularity. Both functions use busy-waiting to achieve the specified delay duration. The file includes the `<inttypes.h>` header to ensure the use of fixed-width integer types, specifically `uint32_t`, for the delay parameters.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `inttypes.h`
